title: Kendo Tiger Send 1 opponent hand card back to deck and shuffle

card.rawText: When summoned, choose 1 of the following effects: Send 1 card from your opponent's hand back to their deck. Shuffle. Destroy 1 magic card on the field.

effect.value: Send back to opponent deck and shuffle
